ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING -- Overruled - alter ego theory adequately plead. 1st Cause of Action - overruled - breach of lease/damages properly plead. 2nd & 3rd Causes of Action - overruled - intentional & negligent misrepresentation properly plead.
The Court amended its tentative in the respect that Defendant shall have 10 days leave to answer. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855 (jjm/md)
